config.name: Primary Reference (R-Drop + Class Weights + 8 Blocks)
config.provenance_note: This run retrains the validation-selected primary Bioformer recipe from the base Bioformer checkpoint on the canonical split so that ablation differences can be interpreted relative to the same primary training pipeline.
